summary: Iteration 67: Tested new features - Budget Calculator (4-step wizard at /calculador), redesigned Sobre Nosotros page, alarm plan APIs, and 'plazas' to 'unidades' fix. ALL 12 backend tests passed. ALL frontend tests passed.
passed_tests: GET /api/alarm-plans returns 3 alarm plans (essential, premium, business)
Alarm plan Essential: 24.99 promo, 34.99 regular, 2 cameras, 1 sentinel
Alarm plan Premium: 39.99 promo, 49.99 regular, 6 cameras, 2 sentinels, popular=true
Alarm plan Business: 54.99 promo, 69.99 regular, 10 cameras, 3 sentinels
POST /api/budget-calculator with piso returns Essential plan
POST /api/budget-calculator with chalet returns Premium plan
POST /api/budget-calculator with local/oficina/nave returns Business plan
Budget calculator with has_garden=true adds extra cameras and sirens
Budget calculator with cameras_extra adds to total camera count
Budget Calculator page loads at /calculador with 4-step wizard
Budget Calculator Step 1: 6 space types (piso, chalet, adosado, local, oficina, nave)
Budget Calculator: Selecting space type advances to Step 2
Budget Calculator Step 2: sqm slider, accesses slider, floors slider, garden toggle
Budget Calculator Step 3: cameras extra slider, calculate button
Budget Calculator: Clicking calculate calls API and shows result (Step 4)
Budget Calculator result shows recommended plan (Essential/Premium/Business)
Budget Calculator result shows promo price, regular price, equipment details
Budget Calculator result shows 'Ahorras X EUR/ano vs Securitas Direct'
Budget Calculator result has CTA button to /contacto
Budget Calculator result has link to /seguridad-hogar-empresa
Sobre Nosotros page (/about-us, /quienes-somos, /sobre-nosotros) loads with hero section
Sobre Nosotros hero: Team photo background, 'Personas reales protegiendo a familias reales'
Sobre Nosotros numbers bar: +3.200 Hogares, +950 Empresas, 30+ Empleados, 4.9/5 Reviews, 2023 Founded
Sobre Nosotros mission section: 4 value cards (Proteccion real, Familias primero, Innovacion, Sin permanencia)
Sobre Nosotros team section: 6 team members with photos and bios
Sobre Nosotros timeline: 2023-2026 milestones
Sobre Nosotros products section: Sentinel watches, Alarmas viviendas, Alarmas negocios
Sobre Nosotros office section: Address, phone, email, coverage info
Sobre Nosotros CTA section with buttons to alarmas, productos, contacto
Main alarm page (/seguridad-hogar-empresa) header has 'Calcular precio' button linking to /calculador
Main alarm page hero has 'Calcular mi precio' button linking to /calculador
Footer has 'Calcular Presupuesto' link to /calculador in FAMILIA column
Urgency popup shows 'unidades' instead of 'plazas' (VERIFIED: 'Solo quedan 50 unidades...')
StockUrgencyPopup appears after ~8 seconds and can be dismissed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 67 verified all new features: 1) Budget Calculator at /calculador - 4-step wizard (space type -> details with sliders -> cameras extra -> result). API POST /api/budget-calculator works correctly recommending Essential for piso/apartamento, Premium for chalet/adosado, Business for local/oficina/nave. 2) GET /api/alarm-plans returns 3 plans with correct pricing. 3) Sobre Nosotros page completely redesigned with hero team photo, numbers bar, mission section, 6 team members, timeline, products section, office info. 4) Calculator links added: header 'Calcular precio' button, hero 'Calcular mi precio' button, footer 'Calcular Presupuesto' link. 5) Urgency popup now uses 'unidades' instead of 'plazas' (verified in screenshot). All backend and frontend tests passed.

budget_calculator.step1: Space type selection (6 options: piso, chalet, adosado, local, oficina, nave)
budget_calculator.step2: Details with sliders (sqm 30-500, accesses 1-8, floors 1-5, garden toggle)
budget_calculator.step4: Result shows recommended plan, promo/regular price, equipment details, savings vs Securitas, CTA to /contacto, link to /seguridad-hogar-empresa

alarm_plans_api.returns: 3 plans (essential, premium, business) with promo/regular prices

sobre_nosotros_redesign.hero: Team photo background with title 'Personas reales protegiendo a familias reales'
sobre_nosotros_redesign.team: 6 members (Daniel Escriva CEO, Maria Lopez, Carlos Ruiz CTO, Ana Garcia, Javier Martinez, Laura Fernandez)
sobre_nosotros_redesign.products: Sentinel watches, Alarmas viviendas, Alarmas negocios

calculator_links.hero: 'Calcular mi precio' button in hero section -> /calculador

plazas_to_unidades.verified: Popup shows 'Solo quedan 50 unidades de Sentinel X Basic GRATIS y 200 unidades con 20% descuento'

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real and functional
